calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73274882 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73274882 --event evt-petition-disposition && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73274882 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find . -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -path '*/record/snapshot*' -o -path '*/record/*.json' -o -path '*/record/*.md' -o -path '*/record/*.txt' | sort | head -200 && find /tmp -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -path '*/record/snapshot*' 2>/dev/null | sort | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -c data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/documents/* && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/context.json && sed -n '1,300p' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.j

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq -r '.CaseNumber, .DocketedDate, .LowerCourt, .LowerCourtCaseNumbers, .LowerCourtDecision, \"--- PROCEEDINGS ---\", (.ProceedingsandOrder[] | [.Date,.Text] | @tsv)' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json && rg -n -i 'relist|conference|distributed|response|reply|amicus|invited|solicitor|grant|denied|order' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json | tail -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","y

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^(INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT|REASONS FOR GRANTING|REASONS FOR DENYING|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION|I\\.|II\\.|III\\.|A\\.|B\\.|C\\.)' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '360,880p' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '880,1560p' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '210,1040p' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);
const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|search.*court|citation/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(hits);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^#{1,5} .*Modern discretionary-cert|^#{1,5} .*relist|^#{1,5} .*CVSG|^#{1,5} .*circuit|^#{1,5} .*salience|25-|Term|Ninth|9th|paid|IFP' metrics/statpack.md | head -240 && sed -n '1,320p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '135,280p' metrics/statpack.md && jq '.scotus_cert_terms // .cert_terms // keys' metrics/statpack.json | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms[0], (.sections | map(.name // .title // .id))' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts open-events --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const a = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"large-capacity magazines\" Second Amendment",filed_after:"2025-01-01",filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["id","caseName","citation","dateFiled","court_citation_string","absolute_url","status","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"});
text(JSON.stringify(a));

const b = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:10925244,fields:["id","cluster_id","type","html_with_citations"]});
text(JSON.stringify(b));

const c = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Caleb Barnett v. Kwame Raoul",filed_after:"2026-07-08",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","docketNumber","cluster_id","opinions","absolute_url"],num_results:5});
text(JSON.stringify(c));

const w = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Wolford v. Lopez",court:"scotus",filed_after:"2026-01-01",filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","docketNumber","cluster_id","opinions","absolute_url"],num_results:5});
text(JSON.stringify(w));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq -r '.ProceedingsandOrder[] | select(.Date == \"Mar 11 2026\" or .Date == \"Mar 13 2026\" or .Date == \"Apr 23 2026\") | .Date, .Text, (.Links[]? | [.Description,.File,.DocumentUrl] | @tsv)' data/cases/scotus/73274882/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const b = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Benson \"large-capacity magazine\" Second Amendment",filed_after:"2025-01-01",filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","court_citation_string","docketNumber","absolute_url"],num_results:10});
text(JSON.stringify(b));

const b = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Benson v. United States",filed_after:"2026-03-01",filed_before:"2026-03-10",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","docketNumber","cluster_id","opinions","absolute_url"],num_results:5});
text(JSON.stringify(b));

const b = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11270885,fields:["id","plain_text"]});
const s=b?.content?.find?.(z=>z.type==="text")?.text??JSON.stringify(b); text(s.slice(0,20000));

const b = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Benson v. United States",filed_after:"2026-03-05",filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","docketNumber","absolute_url"],num_results:10});
text(JSON.stringify(b));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z && date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/prediction.json

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && jq empty data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/*.json && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short --untracked-files=all && git diff --check && git diff --stat -- data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z && sed -n '1,120p' data/cases/scotus/73274882/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/prediction.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);
